query: SELECT id, name, description, targetCustomer, mainBenefit FROM services LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ve2VbkP4iEu522.root --database jQsGzEaS9E2xgaK8jEKUPB --execute SELECT id, name, description, targetCustomer, mainBenefit FROM services LIMIT 5;

rows.name: incredible you coach training
rows.description: The Incredible You Coach Training Program is the world's only complete end-to-end system that transforms ordinary people into extraordinary, heart-activated coaches in just 3 months. Unlike traditional certification-only programs, IYCT equips you with Arfeen Khan's revolutionary 10-week Incredible You System, proprietary heart-based methodology, complete marketing infrastructure, and ongoing support until you succeed—enabling you to build a thriving coaching business while creating profound transformations in others.
rows.targetCustomer: Adults aged 25–55 worldwide stuck in unfulfilling routines and seeking meaningful work and financial freedom. Middle-income earners open to investing in a career change. All genders, no coaching background required. They consume personal growth books, podcasts, and speakers (Western and Indian) and have tried courses, business ideas, or self-improvement repeatedly but relapse into old patterns. They want to become the person in their family who breaks the cycle and creates a new standard
rows.mainBenefit: The Incredible You System is a unique 3-part transformation method. First, the Mind-Heart Activation Protocol™ connects mind and heart, creating a measurable HRV shift and deep clarity. Second, a five-phase sequence maps your Inner DNA, removes self-sabotage patterns, accelerates goals, clears obstacles, and builds lasting success habits. Instead of temporary motivation, it rewires how you naturally think, decide, and act so results become automatic.

rows.description: Help UAE expats build crypto wealth safely
